description: CompositionWhite round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with mega sleeves, a ribbed neckline with grey tape detailing on the inseam and graphic print on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this white Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The bold graphic on the front saying "Luck has nothing to do with it" gives this tee a big dose of attitude. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.
